compose.title: One line, 30 seconds.
compose.hint:
Note just one thing at a time.
File it under a category — the wording needn't be exact.

voice.permissionDenied: Microphone access is needed for voice input
voice.failed: Couldn't transcribe — try again or type it in

category.empty: No categories yet — create one first

denoise.subtitle: Financial signals, inferred and analyzed, newest first.
denoise.empty:
No signals with surfaced targets yet.
Once AI distills targets from your observations, they'll appear here.

toast.subtitle: Tap to see the full inference ↗
